briefdescription.para: Size of the array containing the standard registers used by tcpci dump command.
Type-C Port Controller Interface Specification Revision.
Array containing the standard TCPCI registers list.

detaileddescription.para: If the TCPC driver contain any vendor-specific registers, it may override the TCPCI dump_std_reg function tp dump them and should also dump the standard registers using this array.

briefdescription.para: Function to read the 8-bit register of TCPCI device.

parameterdescription.para: I2C bus
Address of TCPCI register
Pointer to variable that will store the register value

simplesect.para: int Status of I2C operation, 0 in case of success

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct i2c_dt_spec *bus, uint8_t reg, uint8_t value)
memberdef.name: tcpci_write_reg8

briefdescription.para: Function to write a value to the 8-bit register of TCPCI device.

parameterdescription.para: I2C bus
Address of TCPCI register
Value that will be written to the device register

simplesect.para: int Status of I2C operation, 0 in case of success

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct i2c_dt_spec *bus, uint8_t reg, uint8_t mask, uint8_t value)
memberdef.name: tcpci_update_reg8

briefdescription.para: Function to read and update part of the 8-bit register of TCPCI device The function is NOT performing this operation atomically.

parameterdescription.para: I2C bus
Address of TCPCI register
Bitmask specifying which bits of the device register will be modified
Value that will be written to the device register after being ANDed with mask

simplesect.para: int Status of I2C operation, 0 in case of success

briefdescription.para: Function to read the 16-bit register of TCPCI device.

parameterdescription.para: I2C bus
Address of TCPCI register
Pointer to variable that will store the register value

simplesect.para: int Status of I2C operation, 0 in case of success

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct i2c_dt_spec *bus, uint8_t reg, uint16_t value)
memberdef.name: tcpci_write_reg16

briefdescription.para: Function to write a value to the 16-bit register of TCPCI device.

parameterdescription.para: I2C bus
Address of TCPCI register
Value that will be written to the device register

simplesect.para: int Status of I2C operation, 0 in case of success

briefdescription.para: Function that converts the TCPCI alert register to the tcpc_alert enum The hard reset value takes priority, where the rest are returned in the bit order from least significant to most significant.

parameterdescription.para: Value of the TCPCI alert register. This parameter must have value other than zero.

simplesect.para: enum tcpc_alert Value of one of the flags being set in the alert register

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct i2c_dt_spec *bus, enum tc_cc_voltage_state *cc1, enum tc_cc_voltage_state *cc2)
memberdef.name: tcpci_tcpm_get_cc

briefdescription.para: Function that reads the CC status registers and converts read values to enums representing voltages state and partner detection status.

parameterdescription.para: I2C bus
Pointer to variable where detected CC1 voltage state will be stored
Pointer to variable where detected CC2 voltage state will be stored

simplesect.para: -EINVAL if cc1 or cc2 pointer is NULL
int Status of I2C operation, 0 in case of success

briefdescription.para: Function to retrieve information about the TCPCI chip.

parameterdescription.para: I2C bus
Pointer to the structure where the chip information will be stored

simplesect.para: int Status of I2C operation, 0 in case of success

briefdescription.para: Function to dump the standard TCPCI registers.

parameterdescription.para: I2C bus

simplesect.para: int Status of I2C operation, 0 in case of success

briefdescription.para: Function to enable or disable the BIST (Built-In Self-Test) mode.

parameterdescription.para: I2C bus
Boolean flag to enable (true) or disable (false) BIST mode

simplesect.para: int Status of I2C operation, 0 in case of success

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct i2c_dt_spec *bus, struct pd_msg *msg, const uint8_t retries)
memberdef.name: tcpci_tcpm_transmit_data

briefdescription.para: Function to transmit a PD (Power Delivery) message.

detaileddescription.para: The message is transmitted with a specified number of retries in case of failure.

parameterdescription.para: I2C bus
Pointer to the PD message structure to be transmitted
Number of retries in case of transmission failure

simplesect.para: int Status of I2C operation, 0 in case of success

briefdescription.para: Function to select the Rp (Pull-up Resistor) value.

parameterdescription.para: I2C bus
Enum representing the Rp value to be set

simplesect.para: int Status of I2C operation, 0 in case of success

briefdescription.para: Function to get the currently selected Rp value.

parameterdescription.para: I2C bus
Pointer to the variable where the Rp value will be stored

simplesect.para: int Status of I2C operation, 0 in case of success

briefdescription.para: Function to set the CC pull resistor and set the role as either Source or Sink.

parameterdescription.para: I2C bus
Enum representing the CC pull resistor to be set

simplesect.para: int Status of I2C operation, 0 in case of success

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct i2c_dt_spec *bus, uint8_t pd_int_rev, bool enable)
memberdef.name: tcpci_tcpm_set_drp_toggle

briefdescription.para: Function to enable or disable TCPC auto dual role toggle.

parameterdescription.para: I2C bus
Value of the TCPC_REG_PD_INT_REV bits [15..8]
Boolean flag to enable (true) or disable (false) DRP toggle mode

simplesect.para: int Status of I2C operation, 0 in case of success

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct i2c_dt_spec *bus, enum pd_rev_type pd_rev, enum tc_power_role power_role, enum tc_data_role data_role)
memberdef.name: tcpci_tcpm_set_roles

briefdescription.para: Function to set the power and data role of the PD message header.

parameterdescription.para: I2C bus
Enum representing the USB−PD Specification Revision to be set
Enum representing the power role to be set
Enum representing the data role to be set

simplesect.para: int Status of I2C operation, 0 in case of success

briefdescription.para: Function to set the RX type.

parameterdescription.para: I2C bus
Value representing the RX type to be set

simplesect.para: int Status of I2C operation, 0 in case of success

briefdescription.para: Function to set the polarity of the CC lines.

parameterdescription.para: I2C bus
Enum representing the CC polarity to be set

simplesect.para: int Status of I2C operation, 0 in case of success

briefdescription.para: Function to enable or disable VCONN.

parameterdescription.para: I2C bus
Boolean flag to enable (true) or disable (false) VCONN

simplesect.para: int Status of I2C operation, 0 in case of success

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct i2c_dt_spec *bus, enum tcpc_status_reg reg, uint16_t *status)
memberdef.name: tcpci_tcpm_get_status_register

briefdescription.para: Function to get the status of a specific TCPCI status register.

parameterdescription.para: I2C bus
Enum representing the status register to be read
Pointer to the variable where the status will be stored

simplesect.para: int Status of I2C operation, 0 in case of success

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct i2c_dt_spec *bus, enum tcpc_status_reg reg, uint16_t mask)
memberdef.name: tcpci_tcpm_clear_status_register

briefdescription.para: Function to clear specific bits in a TCPCI status register.

parameterdescription.para: I2C bus
Enum representing the status register to be cleared
Bitmask specifying which bits to clear

simplesect.para: int Status of I2C operation, 0 in case of success

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct i2c_dt_spec *bus, enum tcpc_status_reg reg, uint16_t mask)
memberdef.name: tcpci_tcpm_mask_status_register

briefdescription.para: Function to set the mask of a TCPCI status register.

parameterdescription.para: I2C bus
Enum representing the status register to be masked
Bitmask specifying which bits to mask

simplesect.para: int Status of I2C operation, 0 in case of success

briefdescription.para: Queries the current sinking state of the TCPCI.

detaileddescription.para: This function checks if the device is sinking VBUS to the system load.

parameterdescription.para: I2C bus
Pointer to variable where sinking state will be stored

simplesect.para: int Status of I2C operation, 0 in case of success

briefdescription.para: Queries the current sourcing state of the TCPCI.

detaileddescription.para: This function checks if the device is sourcing VBUS.

parameterdescription.para: I2C bus
Pointer to variable where sourcing state will be stored

simplesect.para: int Status of I2C operation, 0 in case of success

briefdescription.para: Function to enable or disable sinking power over VBUS.

parameterdescription.para: I2C bus
Boolean flag to enable (true) or disable (false) sinking power

simplesect.para: int Status of I2C operation, 0 in case of success

briefdescription.para: Function to enable or disable sourcing power over VBUS.

parameterdescription.para: I2C bus
Boolean flag to enable (true) or disable (false) sourcing power

simplesect.para: int Status of I2C operation, 0 in case of success

briefdescription.para: Function to enable or disable the debug accessory mode.

parameterdescription.para: I2C bus
Boolean flag to enable (true) or disable (false) debug accessory mode

simplesect.para: int Status of I2C operation, 0 in case of success

briefdescription.para: Function to enable or disable the low power mode.

parameterdescription.para: I2C bus
Boolean flag to enable (true) or disable (false) low power mode

simplesect.para: int Status of I2C operation, 0 in case of success

briefdescription.para: Helper functions to use by the TCPCI-compliant drivers.

detaileddescription.para: This file contains generic TCPCI functions that may be used by the drivers to TCPCI-compliant devices that want to implement vendor-specific functionality without the need to reimplement the TCPCI generic functionality and register operations.
